156 D2C D2C_NONE_ABOVE (D2C) None of Above Visual Limitations CHAR 1 Vision Patterns: visual limitations/difficulties - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
157 D3 D3_VISUAL_APP (D3) Visual Appliances CHAR 1 Vision Patterns: visual appliances. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
158 E1A E1A_NEG_STATE (E1A) Negative Statements CHAR 1 Mood and behavior patterns: indicators of depression, anxiety, sad mood - verbal
